mapper.sql: pel.employee_id as pe_id, pel.quit_time, pel.job_name, pel.dept_name, pel.procedures_flag, pel.certificate_sign_time, pel.leave_type, pel.remarks, pel.attribute1, pel.attribute2, pel.attribute3, pel.enabled_flag, pel.id, pel.create_time, pel.create_by, pel.update_time, pel.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.quit_time as ${tAlias}_quit_time, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.procedures_flag as ${tAlias}_procedures_flag, ${tAlias}.certificate_sign_time as ${tAlias}_certificate_sign_time, ${tAlias}.leave_type as ${tAlias}_leave_type, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select isnull(fd_dept.dept_name, pe_pej.attribute2) as pe_dept_name, isnull(fd_department.dept_name, pe_pej.attribute3) AS pe_department, isnull(fd_team.dept_name, pe_pej.attribute4) AS pe_team,
,
,
, datediff(year, pe.birthday, GETDATE()) - (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) < month(pe.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) = month(pe.birthday) AND day(GETDATE()) < day(pe.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END) AS pe_age, (CASE WHEN EXISTS (select 1 from employee_temp_check_v cv where cv.employee_id = pe.id) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) pe_need_check,
, ISNULL(pe_peen.id, -1) pe_peen_id,
, ISNULL(pe_pee.id, -1) pe_pee_id,
, ISNULL(pe_pet.id, -1) pe_pet_id,
, ISNULL(pe_pev.id, -1) pe_pev_id,
from pm_employee_leaveoffice pel join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pel.employee_id and pe.leave_flag = 1 left join pm_employee_rehire per on per.employee_id = pe.id left outer join pm_employee_job pe_pej on pe.id = pe_pej.employee_id and pe_pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe_pej.enabled_flag = 1 outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) pe_peen outer apply ( select top(1) pee_ap.* from pm_employee_education pee_ap where pee_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pee_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pee_ap.new_education_flag = 1 ) pe_pee outer apply ( select top(1) pet_ap.* from pm_employee_title pet_ap where pet_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pet_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pet_ap.new_title_flag = 1 ) pe_pet outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) pev_ap.* FROM pm_employee_vocational pev_ap WHERE pev_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pev_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pev_ap.new_vocational_flag = 1 ) pe_pev outer apply f_get_dept_parent_by_level(pe_pej.dept_id,'部','部门','-') fd_dept outer apply f_get_dept_parent_by_level(pe_pej.dept_id,'科室','-','-') fd_department outer apply f_get_dept_parent_by_level(pe_pej.dept_id,'班组','-','-') fd_team
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_leaveoffice (employee_id, quit_time, job_name, dept_name, procedures_flag, certificate_sign_time, leave_type, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{quitTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proceduresFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{certificateSignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{leaveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_leaveoffice set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, quit_time = #{quitTime,jdbcType=DATE}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, procedures_flag = #{proceduresFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, certificate_sign_time = #{certificateSignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, leave_type = #{leaveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pel.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pel.job_name) > 0 then pel.job_name else null end as job_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pel.dept_name) > 0 then pel.dept_name else null end as dept_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pel.leave_type) > 0 then pel.leave_type else null end as leave_type, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pel.remarks) > 0 then pel.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee_leaveoffice pel where pel.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pel.job_name,pel.dept_name,pel.leave_type,pel.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
